prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年河北工业大学在浙江省综合类最低录取位次分别为：2021年约29162名、2022年约26943名、2023年约26683名、2024年约34943名、2025年约34876名 。2021–2023年位次相对稳定在2.6万–2.9万区间，2024年出现明显后移，骤降至约34943名（较2023年后移约8260名），2025年基本持平于34876名，近两年整体后移约8200名，表 明该校在浙江的录取竞争格局发生了显著变化；该校在浙江省综合类招生计划：2021年24人、2022年28人、2023年26人、2024年31人、2025年29人。2026年计划大幅扩招至37人，较2025年增加8人，增幅约27.6%，为近六年最大扩招幅度，对位次有推后（数字增大）作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 河北工业大学为211工程、 双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第107位，近年排名稳定在103–109区间，属于中等偏上211院校。学校类型为理工类，校本部位于天津市，是河北省唯一一所211高 校；该校在2026年声誉评价文件中未出现，近五年声誉信号平稳，无明显正面或负面舆情事件。抖音学校热度总排名第93位，评价为"一般"，综合热度约18万， 短视频平台曝光度中等偏低，未出现报考热度异常信号。投档异常文件中亦无该校相关记录，历史未出现断档或暴跌情况；根据第五轮学科评估数据，河北工业 大学未出现在A-及以上等级学科名单中，表明该校无顶尖学科（A类），但作为传统工科强校，在电气工程、化学工程、机械工程等领域具有较强实力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化（该校王牌专业）2024年专业热度评估为"高热推荐"，社会关注度高；电子信息/通信类为"高热推荐"；计算机类为"推荐"但呈降温趋势；能源动力类为"推荐 "。浙江省2026年普通高考考生总数约40万人，较2025年综合类29.08万人增长约37.6%，考生规模大幅增加，竞争显著加剧。省控线数据2026年缺失，；河北工业大学虽为河北省属，但校址位于天津市，对浙江考生而言属于"异地办学"的211高校，地理位置介于京津冀与长三角之间，地域吸引力中等。该校在浙江招生计划占 比较小（2026年37人），属于省外招生规模较小的211院校。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上因素：；在此基础上，考虑到浙江省2026年考生总数大幅增长约37.6%（远超扩招比例），竞争进一步加剧，以及该校声誉平稳、专业热度分化、无顶尖学科加持等因素，对主值进 行小幅正向修正。预测2026年河北工业大学在浙江省综合类最低录取位次约为40949名，位次区间为40449–41449名。最关键影响因素为：①2026年浙江考生总数大幅增长带来的竞 争加剧；②该校在浙江大幅扩招27.6%对位次的推后作用；③近两年位次已从2.6万档跃迁至3.5万档的新平衡区间。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 河北工业大学2026年在浙江综合类预测位次约40949名，区间40449–41449名。建议位次在40000名以内的考生可将电气工程及其自动化、电子科学与技术等一档专业作为冲刺目标；位次在40500–41500区间的考生以二档专业（物联网工程、能源与动力工程、机械电子工程）为主攻方向；位次在41500名以后的考生可考虑三档专业保底。该校为211/双一流平 台，性价比在同类院校中较高，适合注重学校层次、对工科感兴趣的浙江考生。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Hebei University of Technology in Zhejiang Province's comprehensive category were: approximately 29,162 in 2021, 26,943 in 2022, 26,683 in 2023, 34,943 in 2024, and 34,876 in 2025. Rankings from 2021 to 2023 were relatively stable in the 26,000–29,000 range, but in 2024 there was a significant drop to about 34,943 (a decrease of about 8,260 places from 2023), and in 2025 it remained essentially flat at 34,876. Over the past two years, the ranking has shifted back by about 8,200 places, indicating a notable change in the admission competition landscape for this university in Zhejiang. The enrollment plan for Hebei University of Technology in Zhejiang's comprehensive category was: 24 in 2021, 28 in 2022, 26 in 2023, 31 in 2024, and 29 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 37, an increase of 8 from 2025, a growth of about 27.6%, the largest expansion in the past six years, which will push the ranking back (increase the number).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hebei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 main ranking of the Shanghai Ranking's Academic Ranking of World Universities (ARWU), it ranks 107th, with recent rankings stable in the 103–109 range, placing it among mid-to-upper tier 211 institutions. The university is a science and engineering institution, with its main campus located in Tianjin, and it is the only 211 university in Hebei Province. The university did not appear in the 2026 reputation evaluation documents, and its reputation signals have been stable over the past five years, with no significant positive or negative public opinion events. On Douyin (TikTok), the university's overall popularity ranks 93rd, rated as "average," with a comprehensive popularity of about 180,000, indicating moderately low exposure on short video platforms and no abnormal signals in application popularity. There are also no records of the university in abnormal admission files, and there have been no historical instances of sudden drops or crashes. According to the fifth round of discipline evaluation data, Hebei University of Technology does not appear in the list of disciplines rated A- or above, indicating that the university has no top-tier (A-class) disciplines, but as a traditional engineering powerhouse, it has strong strengths in fields such as electrical engineering, chemical engineering, and mechanical engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Electrical Engineering and Automation (the university's flagship major) was rated as "highly recommended" in 2024, with high social attention; Electronics/Communication majors were also "highly recommended"; Computer majors were "recommended" but showing a cooling trend; Energy and Power majors were "recommended." In 2026, the total number of general college entrance examination candidates in Zhejiang Province is about 400,000, an increase of about 37.6% from the 290,800 comprehensive category candidates in 2025, representing a significant increase in the candidate pool and intensified competition. Provincial control line data for 2026 is missing. Although Hebei University of Technology is a Hebei provincial university, its campus is located in Tianjin, making it a "cross-provincial campus" 211 university for Zhejiang candidates, with a geographical location between the Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei region and the Yangtze River Delta, offering moderate geographical appeal. The university's enrollment plan in Zhejiang is relatively small (37 in 2026), making it a 211 institution with a small out-of-province enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the above factors: on this basis, taking into account the significant increase of about 37.6% in the total number of candidates in Zhejiang Province in 2026 (far exceeding the expansion ratio), further intensified competition, and factors such as stable reputation, divergent major popularity, and lack of top-tier disciplines, a small positive correction is made to the main value. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Hebei University of Technology in Zhejiang Province's comprehensive category in 2026 will be approximately 40,949, with a ranking range of 40,449–41,449. The most critical influencing factors are: ① the intensified competition due to the significant increase in the number of candidates in Zhejiang in 2026; ② the push-back effect on rankings from the university's 27.6% expansion in Zhejiang; ③ the new equilibrium range where rankings have shifted from the 26,000 level to the 35,000 level over the past two years.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the predicted ranking for Hebei University of Technology in Zhejiang's comprehensive category is approximately 40,949, with a range of 40,449–41,449. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 40,000 aim for Tier 1 majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation and Electronic Science and Technology as reach goals; candidates with rankings in the 40,500–41,500 range should focus on Tier 2 majors (Internet of Things Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering, Mechanical and Electronic Engineering) as main targets; candidates with rankings above 41,500 can consider Tier 3 majors as safety options. The university offers a 211/Double First-Class platform with relatively high cost-effectiveness among similar institutions, making it suitable for Zhejiang candidates who value university level and are interested in engineering fields.
